message:
Command `echo "=== $(date) ==="
ps -p 718885 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime 2>/dev/null && echo "LR alive" || echo "LR DONE"
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | grep "^[0-9]" | head -15
echo "---"
ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/" 2>/dev/null && echo "FINAL GDS!" || echo "no GDS"
echo "---"
grep "^[[:space:]]*[0-9].*|" /tmp/librelane_final.log 2>/dev/null | tail -3
echo "---"
tail -3 /tmp/librelane_final.log` executed with exit code 0.

extras.command:
echo "=== $(date) ==="
ps -p 718885 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime 2>/dev/null && echo "LR alive" || echo "LR DONE"
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

echo "---"
